report_title: Impact of Microservice Design on Scalability, Flexibility and Maintainability
executive_summary: Microservice design provides numerous benefits such as improved scalability, flexibility and maintainability, which can have a significant impact on a company's ability to adapt to changing market conditions. In this report, we examine the key findings from our research on microservice design and identify areas where companies can improve their implementation to achieve these benefits.

report_sections.section_content: Microservice design provides numerous benefits such as improved scalability, flexibility and maintainability.
key_insights: Improves scalability by allowing for the deployment of individual services in parallel.
Increases flexibility by enabling changes to be made to components without affecting other parts of the system.

report_sections.section_content: Microservice design provides numerous benefits such as improved scalability, flexibility and maintainability.
key_insights: Improves scalability by allowing for the deployment of individual services in parallel.
Increases flexibility by enabling changes to be made to components without affecting other parts of the system.

report_sections.section_content: The use of microservices can expose the organization to security risks such as information disclosure vulnerability.
key_insights: Improved security is vital when evaluating Microservice Design with Security Concerns.

report_sections.section_content: Microservice design provides numerous benefits such as improved scalability, flexibility and maintainability.
key_insights: Improves maintainability by making it easier to track and debug issues in a large scale system.
